Riadhision

C. D. 154/20/49

AFFAIRES ETRANGERES

23Er 1943

SECRETARIAT

BRITISH EMBASSY,

PARIS.

Ist September, 1949.

Monsieur le Président,

LIN

I have the honour on instructions from His Kajesty's

Prinoipal Seoretary of Stato for Foreign Affairs to notify to

Your Exoollency the accession of Hia Majesty's Gorernment in the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to the

International Convention relating to Exhibitions, signed at

Paris on the 22nd November, 1928.

inforned in due courso of the date of the receipt of this communication by the french Government.

I have the honour to be, with the highest consideration,

Monsieur 1o Président,

Your Excellency' 3 most obedient, tumble Sorvant,

Oliva denver

Son Excellence

Monsieur lo Président Robert Schuman,

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères,

Quai d'orsay,

PARIS, 70.
